summary: Comprehensive testing of Satta Matka game time features (start_time/end_time) completed successfully. All backend APIs and frontend UI features are working correctly.

issues: Time inputs show 12-hour format (02:00 PM) but store 24-hour format (14:00) - this is acceptable UX but could be confusing

passed_tests: GET /api/games returns start_time and end_time for all games
GET /api/admin/games returns start_time and end_time for all games
PUT /api/admin/games/{game_id} successfully updates start_time and end_time
POST /api/admin/games creates new game with start_time and end_time
POST /api/bets rejects bet when game is closed (time-based lock)
All default games have correct time configurations
Admin Panel - Games Settings tab displays start_time and end_time for each game
Admin Panel - Edit dialog has Start Time and End Time input fields (type=time)
GamePage - Shows betting status banner (OPEN/CLOSED) based on current time
GamePage - Bet buttons show lock icon when betting is CLOSED
GamePage - Header displays start_time - end_time range
critical_code_review_comments: Backend time comparison uses IST timezone (UTC+5:30) correctly
Frontend isBettingOpen function handles overnight games (start > end) correctly
Time format validation is present in backend (HH:MM format)
data-testid attributes present for game-start-time-input and game-end-time-input
seed_data_creation: Test game created and deleted during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Game time features (start_time/end_time) are fully implemented and tested. Backend uses IST timezone for time comparison. Frontend checks betting status every 30 seconds. All 6 default games have correct time configurations: delhi_bazaar (14:00-15:00), shri_ganesh (17:00-18:00), faridabad (17:15-18:15), ghaziabad (19:30-20:30), gali (22:30-23:30), disawar (04:00-05:00).
